name: Red Wine Marinade for Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Large garlic cloves minced (black pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a measuring cup, whisk together oil, red wine, fresh lemon juice, dried thyme, and minced garlic.
2. Place beef in a plastic bag or shallow glass dish.
3. Pour marinade over the top of the beef; seal the bag or cover the dish.
4. Refrigerate for 2 to 6 hours.
